sessionStart.bash: d="skills/commentable-html"; m="$d/.skill-resources-1.132.0.ok"; [ -e "$m" ] && exit 0; py=""; for c in python3 python py; do p=$(command -v "$c" 2>/dev/null) || continue; case "$p" in *WindowsApps*) continue;; esac; "$p" -I -c "" >/dev/null 2>&1 && { py="$p"; break; }; done; [ -n "$py" ] && "$py" -I hooks/extract_resources.py --version 1.132.0 --agent copilot >/dev/null 2>&1; true
sessionStart.powershell: powershell -NoProfile -NonInteractive -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$ErrorActionPreference='SilentlyContinue'; if (Test-Path 'skills\commentable-html\.skill-resources-1.132.0.ok') { exit 0 }; $py=$null; foreach ($c in 'python','python3','py') { $cmd=Get-Command $c -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if (-not $cmd) { continue }; if ($cmd.Source -like '*\WindowsApps\*') { continue }; & $cmd.Source -I -c '' 2>$null; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { $py=$cmd.Source; break } }; if ($py) { & $py -I 'hooks\extract_resources.py' --version 1.132.0 --agent copilot *> $null }; exit 0"
